channel.title: Blog on Jinny C
channel.description: Recent content in Blog on Jinny C

item.title: Don't look back
item.description: I often look back what I’ve done. It usually involves pretty bad regret and self-degradation. It can be about my career, relationship or my whole life. These regrets slowly transform how I perceive the world or behave. Like Chihiro forgot her name, this kind of self-reflection is destructive. Re-watching an animation I watched when I was 9 was quite deeply enlightening. It was 17 years ago but I pretty clearly remember the smell of my friend’s house, smile of my friend’s mom and pure love I had to people and life.

item.title: Joy of Reading and Sharing
item.description: I would like to share books I’ve been reading and things I learned or made in this blog. Thanks!
